_comment_nist_fields: Fields below follow IR 8278Ar1 Section 3.2 OLIR template
focal_document_element_description: Data preparation and linkage involves cleansing, modelling, transforming and assuring the quality of data so that it is usable and reproducible.
reference_document_element_description: Ability to distinguish between data quality issues that require systemic remediation at the source system and those that can be appropriately addressed through transformation logic, documentation, or consumer guidance.
comments: DDaT skill intersects with WIDAI DQ domain. DQ-A-002 is the strongest semantic match. Secondary: DQ-S-002 (DQ, cosine: 0.492), AI-S-005 (AI, cosine: 0.472).
_comment_widai_extensions: Fields below are WIDAI extensions per ADR-014

primary_method.name: Cross-Encoder STS
primary_method.description: Semantic Textual Similarity via cross-encoder regression trained on STS-Benchmark.
primary_method.significance: STS 5.2/10 (raw 0.522). Shared vocabulary: [data, quality]. DDaT-only terms [assuring, cleansing, involves, linkage, modelling, preparation] vs WIDAI-only terms [ability, addressed, appropriately, consumer, distinguish, documentation] define the semantic distance between the descriptions.

bertscore.significance: BERTScore F1=0.866 (P=0.874, R=0.858). Balanced P/R — the 21-word DDaT element and 29-word WIDAI KSA cover each other's token-level semantic content symmetrically.

nli_cross_encoder.significance: NLI: neutral-dominant (96.4%). "Data preparation and linkage involves cleansing, modelling, transforming and ass" and "Ability to distinguish between data quality issues that require systemic remedia" are related but neither implies nor contradicts the other. Standard result for cross-framework mapping where two independent frameworks describe overlapping competencies with independent vocabulary.

biencoder_cosine.description: Bi-encoder sentence embeddings with cosine similarity.
biencoder_cosine.significance: Bi-encoder 0.555 ≈ STS 0.522 (gap 0.033). Independent encoding and cross-attention agree. Shared terms [data, quality] are sufficient for independent encoding to detect the match.

jaccard_token.description: Token-level Jaccard similarity (intersection/union of lowercased word tokens).
jaccard_token.significance: Jaccard 12.2%. Shared tokens: [data, quality]. DDaT-only: [assuring, cleansing, involves, linkage, modelling, preparation]. WIDAI-only: [ability, addressed, appropriately, consumer, distinguish, documentation].
